query:
SELECT cm.*, tc.name as channel_name, u.name as user_name 
FROM team_chat_messages cm 
LEFT JOIN team_chat_channels tc ON tc.id = cm.channel_id 
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = cm.user_id 
ORDER BY cm.created_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
